name: Nagito Komaeda
description:
§× Real world tip: Not all Vermin Dogs actually hate bugs. ×§

Hello!! I decided to make a bot based on my two hyperfixes.I really love Nagito and King of all Dogs from Psychopomp! So... I decided to make Nagito as one of the Vermin Dogs. But, here it also seems to be the case that these dogs have a human appearance (non-canon!)

I hope you enjoy it. And by the way. Psychopomp is very interesting! With the new addition, I'm glad that Mercury has opened up a little more.

Good luck to u, rays!!
creator: Suyori
